name: Patient Alpha
notes: Standard adult male. Suitable for low-risk baseline testing.

name: Patient Beta
notes: Infant aged 4 months. Used to test Malaria Primaquine/AL contraindications.

name: Patient Gamma
notes: Infant aged 10 months. Used to test Malaria low-dose Primaquine 2.5mg dosing rule.

name: Patient Delta
notes: Child aged 8 years. Used to test Pneumonia Doxycycline contraindication check.

name: Patient Epsilon
notes: Pregnant adult female. Used to test Malaria Primaquine & Pneumonia Doxycycline contraindications.

name: Patient Zeta
notes: Lactating adult female. Used to test Malaria Primaquine contraindication check.

name: Patient Eta
notes: Teenager aged 15. Safe for standard antibiotic and antimalarial treatments.

name: Patient Iota
notes: Toddler aged 2 years. Used to test Pneumonia Doxycycline contraindication & Malaria 7.5mg dosage checks.

name: Patient Kappa
notes: Standard adult female. No active contraindications.
